title: Pouteria reticulata Eyma
author: MONRO, A. K.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Pouteria reticulata  (Engl.) Eyma    (CR), Faldita de puta (P).     Terrestrial trees. Distribution in PILA 0–2200 m, low elevation mixed forest, mixed forest in transition to low elevation forest, mixed forest in transition to cloud forest, cloud forest, low elevation oak forest. Global distribution: Mexico, Guatemala, Honduras, Costa Rica, Panama, Ecuador to Bolivia. Records:  A. Rodríguez 11903  (BM, INB, MO, PMA),  M. Chinchilla 26  (INB, MO).
